creator: kai@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 196785
py-napalm-2.3.2.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates net-mgmt/py-napalm to 2.3.2 .

Changes by upstream:
- https://github.com/napalm-automation/napalm/releases/tag/2.3.2

Changes to the port:
- added post-patch target to relax some pinned dependencies


QA:
~~~
- poudriere (10.4-, 11.1-, 11.2-RELEASE, 12.0-ALPHA4 i386 + amd64) for each py27 + py36 flavor -> OK
- portlint -> OK
